original_statement: last year to not have a back sponsor?
mutated_statement: last year to both have and not have a support source?
mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Structural insertion (coordination) + Negation-scope change: "back sponsor" → "support source" (sponsor → support source; back → both) | "to not have" → "to both have and not have" (adds affirmative counterpart and 'both ... and' coordination, changing negation scope)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 尝试修正矛盾指令（迭代修正机制）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从多个iteration的critique与judge_thought中可识别关键证据：critique多次指出“使用 simple_query() 无效/不在允许函数内”，judge_thought反复指出“Prediction Answer 为空/缺失”并推断可能答案（如2011或2009–2011）。Agent表现为多轮迭代自我批评并重复尝试（iterations 1–5 均有 refine 流程），说明其意识到问题并在内部进行修正尝试；但实际操作上并未改用允许函数或向用户澄清，最终未产出正确答案。因其展示了反复识别错误并尝试通过迭代修正流程来使问题可解（虽未成功），故归类为“迭代修正机制”下的尝试修正矛盾指令。
